message:
feat(bedrock): add image content block support for user messages

The Bedrock provider previously only extracted text blocks from user messages
with Blocks content, silently dropping image data. This meant vision-capable
Bedrock models (Claude on Bedrock) could not receive images from tool results
or user-supplied image content.

Changes:
- Expand the ContentBlock match in convert_user_message from a single
  if-let-chain for Text to a full match on Text and Image variants
- Map Image blocks to BedrockContent::Image with format extracted from
  the MIME type (e.g., "image/png" -> "png", defaulting to "png")
- Unknown block types are silently skipped (consistent with other providers)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
